title: Imagery + source-data licensing gate (blocking, ODbL-compatibility + authorized-imagery checklist)
context: open-map-gaps may only trace from OSM-authorized imagery (Bing, Esri, Maxar via OSM agreement, Mapbox) and may only conflate against ODbL-compatible source datasets. Using unauthorized imagery (e.g., Google Maps/Earth) causes reverts and account blocks on OSM. Conflating against an incompatible license contaminates the ODbL commons. This gate must be completed — with a committed, reviewer-signed artifact — before any pack can be mapped. It also defers CC-BY / share-alike / ambiguous-source decisions to the import-playbook-014 policy.
objective: Produce and commit a blocking licensing and imagery gate: an authorized-imagery allowlist, a forbidden-imagery list, an ODbL-compatibility checklist for source datasets, and a PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact template, so every pack can be gated before mapping begins.
acceptanceCriteria: Imagery section pins an allowlist of OSM-authorized layers (Bing, Esri, Maxar-via-OSM, Mapbox) with required attribution per layer and the OSM permission reference.
A forbidden list (Google Maps/Earth/Street View and any imagery without an OSM tracing permission) is recorded as a hard exclude.

Source-data section: PASS only if odblCompatible:true is recorded from a cited clause/URL (PD/CC0/ODbL/OSM-compatible waiver); CC-BY/share-alike/ambiguous sources are deferred to import-playbook-014; unparseable/missing evidence = FLAG/EXCLUDE.
Requires a license/permission snapshot: committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL (bare URL insufficient) recorded in snapshotRef.
Produces a committed, reviewable PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact template per area recording which checks ran and what fired.
Artifact reviewed and signed by the licensing/imagery reviewer before any pack may be mapped.
No OSM write credentials are requested or stored; this task produces documentation only.
output: A committed licensing and imagery gate document containing: the authorized-imagery allowlist with attribution, the forbidden-imagery list, the ODbL-compatibility checklist for source datasets, the snapshot-reference format, and a PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact template ready to be completed per pack.
